name: Glacier Bancorp Inc
description: Glacier Bancorp Inc is a regional bank holding company providing commercial banking services through its wholly owned bank subsidiary, Glacier Bank. The group provides a full range of banking services to individuals, small to medium-sized businesses, community organizations, and public entities from several locations in Montana, Idaho, Utah, Washington, Wyoming, Colorado, Arizona, Nevada, and Texas. It offers various banking products and services, including: retail banking, business banking, real estate, commercial, agriculture, and consumer loans; and mortgage origination and loan servicing services, among others.
